creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
On May 1, 2007, at 10:50 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/pear-Text_Diff,
>
> Please note that PR ports/112310 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112310


Looks reasonable to me, go ahead an commit it.

Thanks.
